statements.impact_statement: The affected click.edit() helper is not called by DecisionAgentBench or Inspect AI 0.3.247. Evaluated agents have no shell, Python import, editor, or arbitrary-command tool. Inspect AI currently constrains Click below 8.2.2, so the fixed Click 8.3.3 cannot be resolved without violating upstream metadata. Re-evaluate when Inspect relaxes that bound or by 2026-08-17, whichever occurs first.
